## octagonal-wheels 0.1.48-preview.0

11th July, 2026

I have moved octagonal-wheels into the Fancy Kit monorepo while preserving its independent package and release history. This preview supports registry and consumer review before `0.1.48` becomes stable. It is good to have these wheels rolling from their new home.

### Added

- Portable relative-path validation and joining helpers.
- Exact byte-view helpers for binary values.

### Repository

- Updated package links and future npm provenance to the Fancy Kit monorepo.
- Kept the former standalone repository as a read-only migration signpost.
